response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level experience in software development, leadership, and open-source contributions, aligning well with the Head of Development role. His background includes architectural design, team mentorship, and technical project management across diverse tech stacks. However, his limited direct experience with German (basic level) and lighter focus on UML/modeling design compared to the job requirements slightly reduces his fit.
strengths: Proven leadership in multidisciplinary software teams and open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective)
Strong technical versatility across multiple languages (TypeScript, Python, D, Java) and architectures (microservices, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated expertise in IT security, system optimization, and mentorship through workshops and code katas
concerns: German language proficiency is only at a basic level (A2/A1), below the required C1 minimum
Limited explicit experience with UML modeling and formal requirements management in job history
Lack of direct experience in IT consulting or client-facing architectural advisory roles
